data.title: BTC Slips Below $120K as Policy Shifts Rattle Markets: Is This a Setup for the Next Big Rally?
data.description:
Bitcoin’s record-breaking rally hit a pause this week as shifting U. S. policy signals triggered a sharp pullback. After surging to an all-time high of $124,457 on August 13, BTC plunged as low as $117,477 on Friday morning before stabilizing around $119,000
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/btc-slips-below-120k-as-policy-shifts-rattle-markets-is-this-a-setup-for-the-next-big-rally/

data.title: US Federal Reserve shutters crypto bank supervision program amid broader regulatory pullback
data.description:
The Federal Reserve said it is ending its program supervising banks involved in crypto and financial technology.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/367138/us-federal-reserve-shutters-crypto-bank-supervision-program-amid-broader-regulatory-pullback?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Fed integrates crypto banking oversight into standard regulatory processes, ends additional scrutiny
data.description:
The Federal Reserve (Fed) announced it will shut down its program with additional scrutiny over crypto and fintech activities. On an August 15 statement, the central bank said it will sunset the Novel Activities Supervision Program and return to monitoring banks’ crypto and fintech activities through standard supervisory processes.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/fed-integrates-crypto-banking-oversight-into-standard-regulatory-processes-ends-additional-scrutiny/

data.title: Ether surges to multi-year high, signals potential $6,100 target
data.description:
16-8-2025 – Ether (ETH) reached a multi-year peak of $4,792 this week, climbing 45% from its August 3 low of $3,354. The cryptocurrency is now consolidating just below its all-time high of $4,867, with technical analysis pointing to a bullish continuation pattern known as a bull flag, which could drive prices toward $6,100—a potential 34% [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/ether-surges-to-multi-year-high-signals-potential-6100-target/
